title: Roasted Oozy Zucchini Pasta
description: A floral, gooey Mediterranean dish featuring zucchini and dehydrated pasta, perfect for a crowd-pleasing meal.
instructions: Chop zucchini into thin rounds and dehydrate pasta according to package instructions until golden brown.
Combine zucchini, olive oil, garlic powder, oregano, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper in a mixing bowl.
Toss with zucchini and dried pasta thoroughly, ensuring all pieces are coated evenly.
Spread mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, spacing out the pieces to allow for spreading.
Roast for 10 minutes then flip carefully using tongs or spatula. Continue roasting until golden brown on both sides and pasta is crispy (another 5-7 minutes).
Serve hot as a side dish or lightly drizzle with extra olive oil if desired.
